posts.title: @thegreatdismal
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
It is becoming unprecedentedly difficult for anyone, 
anyone at all, to keep a secret. ((gibson))
where're all the secrets hidden? ((smith))

[ sneak ]

posts.title: furthernorth
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
everything is in boxes
the boxes are in a container
midsized, cross other waters
black -> black waters
where no siren swim
((reminds me of the archangel, singing avemaria))

posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
maybe later we can punt orphans

the answer to the nachlied question:
switzerland-honduras-chile-portugal-paraguay-germany-netherlands
If this was not the big party 
I do not know what the big party could be 
and I give up waiting for it

posts.title: since forever 25 years ago
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
the fate of ducks at easter.
parties. 
big. 
uninvited. 
the two of us. 
alone. 
maybe it is better this way.

posts.title: V
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
Anvil. 
The television on.
Panopticon. 
Peekaboo I can see you.
It's pathetic I know.
But such is life.

posts.title: vintedez
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
away a while. still waiting. manzena hummed along to CwML8v2.
it sounds a bit like this:

"just another ordinary place, makes me feel battered
makes me hum along....home alone....come along
would it be there if you just speed a bit
and watch everyone, everyone you know
tell me i'll be fine you will be mine fine fine"

posts.title: dvanásť [ fragments of tyler x taylor ]
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
0. Pinto's prophecy was one of many that came true.
    The only one yet to come true is the
    September Party 7
1. thinking is nothing more than a strange side effect of
    surviving. 
    it is not "cogito ergo sum".
    it is "supersum ergo cogito".

posts.title: tshe
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
0. [ steeldust ] moved to a proper project. roughly mixed.
    based on a drone created applying a piano sound to
    JB "when the levee breaks".
    manzena did some nice melodies to go with.
    and some interesting stuff with a crystal vst synth.
    the words are tyler's.

1. one day i may get indaba to work.

2. if i was choosing songtitles today, they would have been:
    - liam cooney
    - railroad pueblos
    - nerdy rollibox

2. creativity is an euphemism for lying. viva jarvis.

3. a coyest monster: being reminded of the power of secrets

posts.title: ett
posts.author: Xingu, The River
posts.content:
0. went to the basement. recorded the guitar for [ inferno ].
1. jacked into manzena in madrid via logmein.
    discarded the bassline for [ malfunction ].
    recorded way too loud.
2. smith told me that hell is a forest....
    the end of it at least. i had other ideas.
    it is smith's inferno. so a forest it will be.
    sometimes.
    i played i believe. smith played lennon.
    smith wins. this time
3. manzena will re-record malfunction.
